repo_prior_art.cite: pid_gpn_continuous_rho: inverse continuous-GPN copula-threshold proposal targets thresholded necessity events, not Pr(Y1>Y0) under a Spearman band

published_prior_art.cite: FanPark2009DTEConfidenceSets covers DTE bounds with a known dependence measure; FanPark2010DTEBounds covers unrestricted Makarov DTE bounds; Liang2026RankStickiness is a missed rank-based continuous-DTE comparator but does not subsume Spearman-band partial ID

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_gpn_continuous_rho has an inverse attribution threshold, not a majority-benefit band-envelope criterion

published_prior_art.cite: Generic interval-identified sign logic is standard in ImbensManski2004PartialCI/Stoye2009MoreCI; the Spearman-band envelope notation is proposal-specific

repo_prior_art.cite: No in-catalogue CausalSmith proposal states finite-cell quantile-grid estimators for Spearman-band benefit endpoints

published_prior_art.cite: FanPark2010DTEBounds gives plug-in endpoint inference for Makarov DTE bounds; this adapts the endpoint-estimation rung to a moment-constrained transport sieve

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_bound_intersection_inference is failed generic active-set inference prior art and does not state this stable-dual-face Spearman endpoint law

published_prior_art.cite: FanPark2010DTEBounds, ImbensManski2004PartialCI, and Stoye2009MoreCI supply endpoint and interval-inference templates but not the Spearman-band transport endpoint law

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The survey misses Liang2026RankStickiness, a closer April 2026 arXiv comparator on continuous treatment-effect distributions identified through a nonparametric rank-based copula construction.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: Conjecture 2
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: Stable dual faces and directional differentiability of the Spearman-band endpoint map are assumed as the inference regime.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: Bootstrap endpoint-law claim is conditional on the stable-face finite-cell regime, not a generic active-set/bootstrap theorem.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: Theorem 2
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: Estimator consistency is scoped to finite covariate support and assumes checkerboard approximation bias b_K -> 0.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: Endpoint estimator theorem is a finite-cell sieve-consistency result only.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add Liang2026RankStickiness to Related work and the Conjecture 1 Gap clause, distinguishing Spearman-band partial identification from Bregman-Sinkhorn point identification under rank stickiness.
Add a small quantile-grid worked example in §9 showing a nontrivial Spearman band endpoint strictly between the unrestricted Fan-Park/Makarov endpoint and a singleton-rho endpoint.
Correct the Kellerer DOI/location metadata: the verified DOI is 10.1007/BF00532047, not 10.1007/BF00533791.
For Conjecture 2, state the candidate directional derivative or dual-face support-function formula that the m-out-of-n bootstrap is meant to estimate.

recommended_next_step: continue revise on this angle: patch the missed Liang rank-copula comparator and metadata, then advance to Stage 0 if no new flags appear
